title: Double Hit grants a second initiated battle

plan.providerWarning: No WARD_LLM_API_KEY or OPENAI_API_KEY found. The app will use local fallback plans until a server key is configured.

card.rawText: Equipped creature can initiate battle twice during their turn. Your opponent can only return attack for 1 of these battles.

effect.value: May initiate battle twice during controller's turn

plan.title: Double Hit grants a second initiated battle
plan.summary: Equip Double Hit and verify the equipped creature gains the battle requirement effect that allows one extra initiated battle.

notes: Equip Double Hit to player_1 primary creature; equipped creature can initiate battle twice during its turn.

steps: Verify the extra initiated battle effect is active.

expectedAssertions.label: Equipped creature has battle requirement effect

manualVerification: A full battle-count interaction should prove the second initiated battle can be used only during the controller turn.
riskNotes: This fixture is the extra-initiated-battle branch; 014-E02 covers return-attack limits.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run gen2_014_double_hit-014-e01 through headless Gen 2 effect QA.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and card rules text remain source of truth.
